# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-all-ingress
spec:
  selectors:
  - matchLabels:
      service.name: my-service
  ingress:
  - action: allow

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: authenticate-requests
spec:
  selectors:
  - matchLabels:
      service.name: protected-service
  authorization:
    rules:
    - matches:
        source.labels.service.name: my-service
      action: allow

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: restrict-ingress-to-my-cluster
spec:
  selectors:
  - matchLabels:
      service.name: external-service
  ingress:
    destinations:
    - matchSubsetOfLabel:
        subsetLabels:
          linkerd.io/cluster: my-cluster

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: rate-limit-my-service
spec:
  selectors:
  - matchLabels:
      service.name: my-service
  quota:
    rules:
    - matchSubsetOfLabel:
        subsetLabels:
          linkerd.io/cluster: my-cluster
      rateLimit:
        requestsPerSecond: 100

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: external-service
spec:
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-policy
spec:
  selectors:
  - matchLabels:
      service.name: my-service
  server:
    policies:
    - name: quota-limitation
